use_case: Failed credit card or invoice payment
customer_reply: We noticed your recent payment didn't go through. Please update your payment method in your account settings, or reach out if you need assistance. We're here to help!
internal_note: Check for expired cards or bank declines. Offer payment plan if customer requests.

customer_reply: I've attached your invoice for [period]. You can also access all invoices in your account under Billing > Invoices. Let me know if you need anything else!
internal_note: Invoices available in admin portal. Enterprise customers may need custom billing format.

customer_reply: Great choice! I can help you upgrade to [plan name]. Your new features will be available immediately, and we'll pro-rate your current billing cycle. Would you like me to process this now?
internal_note: Confirm customer understands pricing change. Upgrades are immediate; downgrades happen at renewal.

customer_reply: I'm sorry to see you go! Before we process the cancellation, is there anything we can help with? If you'd like to proceed, your access will continue until [end date], and you won't be charged again.
internal_note: Always ask for feedback. Offer to pause account instead of cancel if appropriate.

customer_reply: I understand your concern about this charge. Let me review your account and billing history. I'll investigate and get back to you within 24 hours with a detailed explanation or resolution.
internal_note: Never admit fault immediately. Escalate to Finance if over $500. Document everything.
